titles.title: In Your Presence That's Where I Belong

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I want to go, where the rivers cannot overflow me Where my feet are on the rock I want to hide, where the blazing fire cannot burn me In Your presence, O God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In Your presence, that's where I am strong In Your presence, O Lord, my God In Your presence, that's where I belong Seeking Your face, touching Your grace In the cleft of the rock In Your presence, O God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I want to hide, where the flood of evil cannot reach me Where I'm covered by the Blood I want to be, where the schemes of darkness cannot touch me In Your presence, O God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are my firm foundation I trust in You all day long I am Your child and Your servant And You are the strength and my song You're my song
